languages.original_text: "The scope of the Rogue Trader's vision is quite inspiring. I never imagined I would be able to study a live xenos, albeit not entirely in its natural environment. What do you think, Nuncius?"

languages.text: "Широта взглядов Вольного Торговца весьма вдохновляюща. Не предполагал, что смогу изучить живого ксеноса, хоть и не во вполне естественной среде. Что думаешь, Нунциус?"
"The scope of the Rogue Trader's vision is quite inspiring. I never imagined I would be able to study a live xenos, albeit not entirely in its natural environment. What do you think, Nuncius?"
languages.original_text: "Широта взглядов Вольного Торговца весьма вдохновляюща. Не предполагал, что смогу изучить живого ксеноса, хоть и не во вполне естественной среде. Что думаешь, Нунциус?"

traits.locale_text: "The scope of the Rogue Trader's vision is quite inspiring. I never imagined I would be able to study a live xenos, albeit not entirely in its natural environment. What do you think, Nuncius?"
"The scope of the Rogue Trader's vision is quite inspiring. I never imagined I would be able to study a live xenos, albeit not entirely in its natural environment. What do you think, Nuncius?"
"The scope of the Rogue Trader's vision is quite inspiring. I never imagined I would be able to study a live xenos, albeit not entirely in its natural environment. What do you think, Nuncius?"

languages.text: «La magnitud de la visión de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente es inspiradora. Nunca habría imaginado que podría estudiar un xenos vivo, aunque sea fuera de su entorno natural. ¿Qué opina, Nuncius?».
languages.original_text: "The scope of the Rogue Trader's vision is quite inspiring. I never imagined I would be able to study a live xenos, albeit not entirely in its natural environment. What do you think, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: «La magnitud de la visión de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente es inspiradora. Nunca habría imaginado que podría estudiar un xenos vivo, aunque sea fuera de su entorno natural. ¿Qué opina, Nuncius?».

languages.text: 「ローグトレーダーの構想の広さは、実に刺激的です。完全に自然な環境においてではないにせよ、生きた異種族を研究できる日が来るとは、思いもよりませんでした。君はどう思いますか、ヌンキウス？」
languages.original_text: "The scope of the Rogue Trader's vision is quite inspiring. I never imagined I would be able to study a live xenos, albeit not entirely in its natural environment. What do you think, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: 「ローグトレーダーの構想の広さは、実に刺激的です。完全に自然な環境においてではないにせよ、生きた異種族を研究できる日が来るとは、思いもよりませんでした。君はどう思いますか、ヌンキウス？」

languages.text: “行商浪人的境界确实令人振奋。我从未想过自己能研究一个活生生的异形，哪怕它并不完全处于自然环境中。努恩修斯，你怎么看？”
languages.original_text: "The scope of the Rogue Trader's vision is quite inspiring. I never imagined I would be able to study a live xenos, albeit not entirely in its natural environment. What do you think, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: “行商浪人的境界确实令人振奋。我从未想过自己能研究一个活生生的异形，哪怕它并不完全处于自然环境中。努恩修斯，你怎么看？”

languages.text: "Die Vision {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} ist wirklich inspirierend. Ich hätte nie gedacht, dass ich einmal einen lebenden Xenos studieren kann, wenn auch nicht ganz in seinem natürlichen Habitat. Was denkt Ihr, Nuncius?"
languages.original_text: "The scope of the Rogue Trader's vision is quite inspiring. I never imagined I would be able to study a live xenos, albeit not entirely in its natural environment. What do you think, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: "Die Vision {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} ist wirklich inspirierend. Ich hätte nie gedacht, dass ich einmal einen lebenden Xenos studieren kann, wenn auch nicht ganz in seinem natürlichen Habitat. Was denkt Ihr, Nuncius?"

languages.text: « L'étendue de la vision {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} est une véritable source d'inspiration. Je n'aurais jamais imaginé pouvoir étudier un xénos vivant, bien qu'en dehors de son environnement naturel à proprement parler. Une idée sur la question, Nuncius ? »
languages.original_text: "The scope of the Rogue Trader's vision is quite inspiring. I never imagined I would be able to study a live xenos, albeit not entirely in its natural environment. What do you think, Nuncius?"

traits.locale_text: « L'étendue de la vision {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} est une véritable source d'inspiration. Je n'aurais jamais imaginé pouvoir étudier un xénos vivant, bien qu'en dehors de son environnement naturel à proprement parler. Une idée sur la question, Nuncius ? »

languages.text: "Hür Tacir'in vizyonunun kapsamı oldukça ilham verici. Canlı bir zenoyu, tamamen doğal ortamında olmasa bile inceleyebileceğimi hiç hayal etmemiştim. Ne düşünüyorsun Nuncius?"
languages.original_text: "The scope of the Rogue Trader's vision is quite inspiring. I never imagined I would be able to study a live xenos, albeit not entirely in its natural environment. What do you think, Nuncius?"
